summary: Cannot verify REQ-9 implementation because the diff for `backend/main.mo` is truncated before `getHeartbeatData`, and there is no visible evidence of the required `ExperimentalCycles.balance()` usage / fallback comment. missing_requirements.requirement: Update `backend/main.mo` `getHeartbeatData` so `cycles` no longer uses an unavailable cycles balance API; use `ExperimentalCycles.balance()` if available, otherwise set `cycles` to `0` and add the exact comment `// TODO: Replace with actual cycle balance API when available.`; do not change any other `getHeartbeatData` logic/shape/access control.
missing_requirements.reason: The provided `backend/main.mo` diff is truncated and does not include `getHeartbeatData` or any visible change to `cycles` retrieval logic (no `ExperimentalCycles` import/usage or the required TODO comment is shown). Therefore there is insufficient evidence that REQ-9 was implemented.
evidence: backend/main.mo (truncated; does not show getHeartbeatData or cycles logic)
